howItWorks.intro: This life insurance needs calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: DIME Method
rules.explanation: Sum of income replacement, debts, and education funding needs.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.q: How much life insurance do I need?
faq.a: The DIME method: Debt + Income replacement + Mortgage + Education costs.
Term is cheaper and covers most needs. Whole life includes investment but costs 5-10x more.

howWeCalculate.intro: This life insurance needs calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
